column1: # HELCOM grey-seal abundance — Baltic population estimate per year.
# v0.41.0 Arc 0 upgrade: values cross-referenced against Harding 2007
# IMPORTANT: coordinated pan-Baltic aerial moult surveys began in 2000.
# Pre-2000 values are minimum-population-size BACKCASTS from Harding &
# reconstruction. Post-2000 values are from HELCOM SEAL Expert Group
# coordinated aerial moult surveys ("counted" = hauled-out seals).
# correction); we ship `counted` throughout for compatibility with
#   Harding et al. 2007. NAMMCO Sci. Publ. 6
#   Galatius et al. 2020. Wildlife Biology 2020(4). DOI 10.2981/wlb.00711
#   Westphal et al. 2025. Aquatic Conserv. 35(5). DOI 10.1002/aqc.70147
#   HELCOM. Grey seal abundance core indicator.
